understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to progress through all levels by maneuvering selectable pieces to push objects onto goal tiles marked as '+', ultimately achieving a WIN condition for the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions like MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT shift the selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the specified direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects if they are in the way; walls block movement and prevent shifts; selection is changed by using the CLICK action on the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable piece to switch control.
